text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 34 

LCNS_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Provider License Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the kind of license or accreditation number that is captured in the LCNS_NUM data 
element. 

SHORT NAME: LCNS_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: LCNS_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR License 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = State, county, or municipality professional
